name: Chicken Spinach Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook chicken in water with seasoned salt until tender. Strain and reserve the liquid for use as stock.
2. Cut the cooked meat into bite-sized pieces. Set aside the reserved stock.
3. Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
4. Stir in flour to form a paste, then gradually add milk and chicken stock while stirring constantly until thickened.
5. Add sour cream, lemon juice, mushrooms (with juices), water chestnuts (if using), onions, celery, seasoned salt, pepper, Accent, paprika, salt, and cayenne pepper. Stir until smooth.
6. In a buttered 3-quart baking dish, layer half of the sauce, then half of the chicken pieces. Repeat with remaining ingredients, finishing with a top layer of cheese.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until bubbly and golden. Serve warm with homemade bread and salad.
